# OpenID for Verifiable Presentations 1.0

## Section 3.2 Verifier-initiated presentation request
The Verifier sends an authorization request or presentation request directly to the Wallet.
This specification does not define a dedicated Authorization Server role for the verifier-initiated presentation flow.

## Section 7 Response handling
The Wallet returns the presentation response directly to the Verifier or through the User Agent, depending on the flow.
